name: smis
description: نظام إدارة الصحة الرياضية المتكامل - Sports Medical Information System

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
